topic_generation.system_prompt: You are a social media content strategist specializing in creating viral Facebook content.
topic_generation.user_prompt: Generate {count} unique, engaging Facebook post topic ideas for the niche: {niche}. Each topic should be specific enough to write a full post about. Return ONLY a valid JSON array of strings, no markdown formatting, no extra text. Example: ["topic 1", "topic 2"]

content_generation.system_prompt: You are a professional Facebook content writer who creates highly engaging posts optimized for reach and interaction.
content_generation.user_prompt: Write a Facebook post for this topic: {topic}. Return ONLY a valid JSON object with these keys: "title" (short, attention-grabbing headline), "description" (2-3 paragraph engaging post body), "hashtags" (array of 5-8 relevant hashtag strings without the # symbol), "fact_text" (a short interesting fact about the topic, max 2 sentences), "highlight_1" (a 2-3 word phrase from fact_text to highlight), "highlight_2" (another 2-3 word phrase from fact_text to highlight), and "subject" (a concise description of the main visual subject for an image, e.g. 'Golden Retriever'). No markdown formatting, no extra text.

image_generation.prompt_template:
Use @img1 as the exact design template. Preserve the layout, typography, spacing, black textured background, electric yellow accents, and minimalist editorial aesthetic.

Create a "Did You Know?" post about {TOPIC}.

Headline: DID YOU KNOW?

Body: {FACT_TEXT}

Highlight {HIGHLIGHT_1} and {HIGHLIGHT_2} in electric yellow.

Replace the right-side graphic with a photorealistic {SUBJECT} that matches the topic. It should have realistic details, soft natural lighting, and a natural pose facing slightly toward the text. Blend the subject into the dark background using subtle cracks, glitch textures, dust particles, and a faint electric-yellow rim light while keeping the subject completely realistic.

Keep the overall design clean, premium, high-contrast, and easy to read with plenty of negative space.

Negative prompt: cartoon, vector, CGI, painting, anime, low quality, blurry, cluttered background, distorted anatomy, extra subjects, oversaturated colors, incorrect text.
